response:
Yes. Workable integrates with **LinkedIn Recruiter** and also offers several LinkedIn connection options, including **LinkedIn Basic jobs**, **LinkedIn premium job posting**, **LinkedIn Recruiter System Connect**, and **LinkedIn Apply Connect**.[1][2]

The main direct Recruiter integration lets you sponsor jobs through Workable, connect jobs to your LinkedIn company page, and manage jobs in your LinkedIn Recruiter account.[1] Workable notes that this integration is **not available for Recruiter Lite** accounts.[1][2]

If you want, I can also break down **which LinkedIn integration fits your use case**.
